title: Release Verifier
purpose: Verify that a tagged release has the expected local tag, GitHub release metadata, prerelease flag, and published assets without mutating release state.
trigger: Run after a release tag is pushed or before announcing a release artifact set.
inputs: GitHub release metadata from gh when available
allowedActions: inspect GitHub release metadata read-only through gh
compare prerelease flags against semver prerelease tags
compare published asset names against the expected asset set
write a concise release verification report
forbiddenActions: create, delete, edit, or upload GitHub releases
create, move, or delete git tags
stage, commit, merge, push, or clean worktrees
dispatch sessions or mutate the orchestration ledger
claim production runtime proof from release metadata

evidence.direct: Reserved for future direct download/runtime proof; the MVP does not emit direct production proof.
evidence.proxy: GitHub release metadata and asset names observed through gh.
evidence.local: Local git tag and expected asset contract checks.
evidence.blocked: Missing repo, unavailable gh, auth/network failure, or unparseable release metadata.

escalation: Ask a human before creating, deleting, editing, or re-uploading release assets.
Stop if gh cannot inspect the release and no accepted alternate read-only evidence is available.
Do not announce a release when expected assets or prerelease flags fail verification.
